candidate.name: query_major_scorepage_same_producer_dq_dkv
candidate.contract: One query-major CTA computes the H64 score/prob/scaled-dP page, then emits both dQ and compressed dKV from that same source-boundary producer without materialized probs/grad_logits or scaled-dP HBM page.

decision.reason: Sharing the score/prob/scaled-dP page in one launch does not make this schedule viable. The same producer still reloads KV for dQ over all D blocks and uses raw compressed-group dKV atomics, so the full source-boundary output path is 30.60 ms versus the 11.13 ms retained gate.
decision.next_kernel_direction: Move to a lower-level cooperative/persistent owner where score/prob/scaled-dP tiles are consumed by dQ and group-aware dKV before HBM, with D-parallel consumers that avoid serial KV replay and a compressed-group epilogue that reduces before global atomics.
